username.description: Mixpanel Query API service account username (not secret), consumed by hooks/mixpanel/hooks.go's AuthHook. Takes priority over the username_secret secret when both are set (matches legacy's mixpanelCredentials config-then-secrets precedence).

base_url.description: Mixpanel Query API base URL override for tests or proxies.

project_id.description: Mixpanel project id used by current Query API, Annotations API, and other project-scoped API endpoints.

workspace_id.description: Optional Mixpanel workspace id for Query API endpoints that accept workspace_id.

annotation_id.description: Annotation id for the project_annotation detail stream.

from_date.description: Optional yyyy-mm-dd lower date bound for current Query or Annotations API streams.

to_date.description: Optional yyyy-mm-dd upper date bound for current Query or Annotations API streams.

analysis_type.description: Mixpanel event analysis type for event breakdown streams: general, unique, or average.

event_name.description: Event name for event-property breakdown streams.

distinct_ids.description: JSON array string of distinct ids for the activity_stream Query API stream.

limit.description: Optional result limit for Query API list-style streams.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; leave unset, or use all/unlimited, to exhaust the stream.

username_secret.description: Mixpanel Query API service account username, provided as a secret (mirrors legacy's cfg.Secrets["username"] fallback). Used only when the non-secret username config value is unset; matches legacy's mixpanelCredentials config-then-secrets precedence exactly. Never logged.

password.description: Mixpanel Query API service account secret (password). Takes priority over api_secret when both are set (matches legacy's password-then-api_secret precedence). Used only for Basic auth; never logged.

api_secret.description: Mixpanel legacy project API secret, used as the Basic auth password only when the password secret is unset (matches legacy's mixpanelCredentials fallback). Never logged.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
